role: Directory containing the view generation and rendering subsystem for ArchSpine's architectural visualization and analysis views.
responsibility: Collectively, these components generate, validate, persist, and render various architectural views (architecture diagrams, risk hotspots, public surface, etc.) using LLM-based specifications, scoring algorithms, and markdown templates, and manage view registry and configuration.

children.role: Pure rendering utility that transforms architectural diagram specifications into SVG markup.
ArchSpine view derivation service that orchestrates the generation, validation, and persistence of architecture diagram views using LLM-based specification generation.
Pure utility module providing scoring, path suppression, and cross-boundary analysis functions for the view layer.
Infrastructure module that loads and caches indexed Spine units from the .spine/index directory for view layer consumption, particularly architecture diagram generation.
Public facade module for the view subsystem, centralizing exports for view-specific runtime and rendering components within the MCP (Model Context Protocol) resource layer.
View generation scoring engine that ranks source files by their likelihood of being public API surface.
View generator function for architectural risk hotspot calculation from indexed code units.
TypeScript interface defining a metadata wrapper for SpineUnit with line count, used by infrastructure components for index reading.
Central registry and type definition module for architectural visualization views within the ArchSpine system.

View service module that renders architectural view artifacts (risk hotspots, CLI entries, MCP entries, module entries, public surface) into formatted markdown reports using filesystem-loaded templates.
Configuration resolution module for the experimental view layer and enabled views within the ArchSpine system.
